monster.name: LudmillaDawnshield
monster.description: Ludmilla Dawnshield is just over twenty but carries the experience of someone who grew up among nautical charts and tales of lost lands. Short-cropped brown hair for practicality, skin tanned by sun and sea wind, bright attentive eyes. She wears sturdy travel clothes and always wears a medallion around her neck with the **family crest**: a set of scales superimposed on a sea wave. She speaks with enthusiasm when it comes to exploration and history, but becomes serious and measured when the conversation touches on her family or Svoalbard. She has a quiet determination that makes her reliable in critical moments. Role: ally
